User.details: SELECT tuser.*, trole.role_fr, trole.role_en, tstatus_tracking.idStatus, tstatus.type, tstatus.title_fr, tstatus.title_en FROM tuser JOIN trole ON tuser.idRole = trole.idRole JOIN tstatus_tracking ON tuser.idUser = tstatus_tracking.idUser JOIN tstatus ON tstatus_tracking.idStatus = tstatus.idStatus ORDER BY tuser.lastName, tuser.firstName, tuser.email;
